title: Stech Email Tone Improver (Batch + Dynamic Mapping)
description: Upload any CSV from your ATS, map columns, and SETI will generate warm rejection emails.

csvFile.title: CSV File
csvFile.description: Upload a CSV file from your ATS (any column names).

columnMapping.title: Column Mapping
columnMapping.description: Map placeholders in your template to actual column names in the CSV. Example: { "name": "Full Name", "position": "Job Title" }

rejectionTemplate.title: Rejection Email Template
rejectionTemplate.description: Use {name}, {position}, {company} as placeholders. Example: 'Dear {name}, thank you for applying for {position}. Unfortunately...'
rejectionTemplate.prefill: Dear {name}, thank you for your application for the {position} position. After careful review, we have decided not to move forward. We wish you success in your job search.

defaultTone.title: Default Tone
defaultTone.description: Fallback tone if not specified per email. Choose one of the allowed values.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of emails to process simultaneously (1-20). Higher is faster but may hit rate limits.

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Max wait time per email request in seconds.
